sentences.arabic: لَقَدْ أَحْدَثَ الْقُرْآنُ الْكَرِيمُ نَقْلَةً نَوْعِيَّةً فِي مَسَارِ اللُّغَةِ الْعَرَبِيَّةِ، حَيْثُ أَرْسَى قَوَاعِدَ الْبَلَاغَةِ وَالْفَصَاحَةِ بِشَكْلٍ غَيْرِ مَسْبُوقٍ.
sentences.translation: Časni Kur'an je donio kvalitativni pomak u putanji arapskog jezika, jer je postavio pravila retorike i rječitosti na način bez presedana.
sentences.translationEn: The Holy Quran brought about a qualitative shift in the trajectory of the Arabic language, as it established the rules of rhetoric and eloquence in an unprecedented manner.

sentences.arabic: اِسْتَفَادَ الْأُدَبَاءُ وَالشُّعَرَاءُ عَبْرَ التَّارِيخِ مِنْ تَرَاكِيبِهِ الْفَرِيدَةِ وَمُفْرَدَاتِهِ الْغَنِيَّةِ لِتَطْوِيرِ أَدَوَاتِهِمْ بِمَا يُنَاسِبُ رُوحَ الْعَصْرِ.
sentences.translation: Književnici i pjesnici kroz historiju koristili su njegove jedinstvene strukture i bogat vokabular da razviju svoje alate u skladu s duhom vremena.
sentences.translationEn: Writers and poets throughout history have benefited from its unique structures and rich vocabulary to develop their tools to suit the spirit of the age.

sentences.arabic: تَتَجَلَّى هَذِهِ التَّأْثِيرَاتُ فِي اسْتِخْدَامِ الْمُحَسِّنَاتِ اللَّفْظِيَّةِ وَالْمَعْنَوِيَّةِ الَّتِي تُضْفِي رَوْنَقًا خَاصًّا عَلَى النُّصُوصِ الْأَدَبِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Ovi utjecaji se očituju u upotrebi verbalnih i značenjskih ukrasa koji daju poseban sjaj književnim tekstovima.
sentences.translationEn: These influences are evident in the use of verbal and semantic embellishments that add a special luster to literary texts.

sentences.arabic: لَمْ يَقْتَصِرِ الْأَمْرُ عَلَى الْجَانِبِ الدِّينِيِّ، بَلْ تَعَدَّاهُ لِيُصْبِحَ الْقُرْآنُ مَرْجِعًا لُغَوِيًّا لِكُلِّ مَنْ أَرَادَ أَنْ يَبْلُغَ ذُرْوَةَ الْبَيَانِ.
sentences.translation: Stvar nije bila ograničena samo na religiozni aspekt, već je Kur'an postao lingvistička referenca za svakoga ko želi dostići vrhunac rječitosti.
sentences.translationEn: The matter was not limited to the religious aspect; rather, the Quran became a linguistic reference for anyone who wanted to reach the pinnacle of eloquence.

sentences.arabic: إِنَّ تَدَبُّرَ الْآيَاتِ يُعَلِّمُ الْكَاتِبَ كَيْفِيَّةَ اخْتِيَارِ اللَّفْظِ الْمُنَاسِبِ لِلْمَقَامِ الْمُنَاسِبِ.
sentences.translation: Razmišljanje o ajetima uči pisca kako da odabere odgovarajuću riječ za odgovarajuću priliku.
sentences.translationEn: Contemplating the verses teaches the writer how to choose the appropriate word for the appropriate occasion.
